summary: Balanced Neumann audience source with crisp highs and stronger bass, though no specific show highlights mentioned
review: The reviewer praises this Neumann‑mic pull as a well‑balanced recording that delivers clearer low end while retaining the crispy high frequencies of other sources. No comments on the musical performance are provided, so the analysis focuses on the audio quality alone.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 4‑star review; it highlights good recording balance but gives no insight into the performance, leading to a solid yet cautious rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Balanced tonal response with clear highs and improved bass compared to Hill Nak 100; no major flaws or dropouts reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No performance details were mentioned in the review.
